Query Params:
• thread_id: 채팅 세션 ID (없으면 새로 생성)
• token: JWT 인증 토큰
Response:
Server → Client:
{ "type": "intent" | "status" | "text_stream" | "place" | "places" | "events" | "course" | "map_markers" | "map_route" | "chart" | "calendar" | "references" | "analysis_sources" | "disambiguation" | "done" | "error",
  "content": {} }

• 1프레임 = 1블록 (JSON)
• done이 오면 응답 종료
• error에 retryable 플래그 포함

응답 블록 순서:
intent → text_stream → events[] → done

events 블록:
{ "items": [
  { "event_id": "uuid",
    "title": "string",
    "date_start": "date",
    "date_end": "date",
    "place_name": "string",
    "price": "string",
    "detail_url": "string",
    "source": "db" | "naver" }
] }

Query Params:
• thread_id (optional): 특정 대화 필터
• pin_type (optional): 핀 타입 필터
• cursor: 페이지네이션
• limit: 기본 20
Response:
Response (200 OK)
{ "items": [
    { "bookmark_id": "uuid",
      "thread_id": "string",
      "thread_title": "string",
      "message_id": "string",
      "pin_type": "string",
      "preview_text": "string",
      "created_at": "ISO 8601" }
  ],
  "next_cursor": "string" }

Response (201 Created)
{ "bookmark_id": "uuid",
  "thread_id": "string",
  "message_id": "string",
  "pin_type": "string",
  "preview_text": "string",
  "created_at": "ISO 8601" }
Response (204 No Content)
